description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu spent 3 hrs 9 mins coding, with a daily average of 1 hr 2 mins. On GitHub, he opened 13 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, from #94 through #106. His tracked coding time was mostly in Java, with additional time in Python and Markdown.
